query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms WHERE tenantId = 1 AND isActive = 1) AS salas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE tenantId = 1 AND role = 'professional') AS profissionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE tenantId = 1) AS reservas,
  (SELECT plan FROM tenants WHERE id = 1) AS plano;
